toast.alreadyInPlaylist: This song is already in the playlist

songList.empty: No songs yet, please add or scan

confirm.message: Are you sure you want to remove {count} song(s) from this playlist?

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm

warning.defaultPlaylist: Cannot perform this operation on the default playlist
warning.sameName: New name is the same as the old one

toast.alreadyInLike: Selected song(s) already in liked songs
toast.alreadyInPlaylist: Selected song(s) already in this playlist

settings.title: Settings
settings.blacklistDesc: View blacklisted songs. Songs added to the blacklist will be excluded when scanning the library.
settings.languageDesc: Select the display language for the interface.

other.title: Miscellaneous
other.exportDataDesc: Export all Melodio data including song information, playlists, settings, etc. to a JSON file.
other.importDataDesc: Import JSON data. Warning: This will overwrite current data and cause data loss!

interface.title: Theme Settings
interface.darkModeDesc: When enabled, the interface will switch to a dark theme.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: Switches for related features provided by the app.
accessibility.pinyinSearchDesc: When enabled, all searches will support fuzzy Pinyin matching.
accessibility.autoPauseOnDisconnectDesc: Automatically pause playback when headphones are unplugged or a Bluetooth device is disconnected.
accessibility.autoCleanInvalidSongsDesc: Automatically remove song entries that have been moved or deleted.
accessibility.canFetchCoverFromWebDesc: When enabled, the system will automatically go online to fetch covers for songs that lack them.
accessibility.audioFocusPauseDesc: Automatically pause playback when another app starts playing sound.

editor.title: Sort Songs
editor.unsavedMessage: You have unsaved changes to the order. Do you want to leave? Unsaved changes will be lost.

blacklist.title: Blacklist
blacklist.successAdded: Successfully added {count} song(s) to the blacklist.

confirm.title: Prompt
confirm.message: Are you sure you want to remove these {count} items from the blacklist?

toast.removeSuccess: Successfully removed {count} items from the blacklist!

deleteAllSongs.title: Prompt
deleteAllSongs.message: Are you sure you want to clear the blacklist?
